title: Just-In CAVE
description: A new tool can help you mining easier,and some thing cool in cave.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a5421842c834fbe36c9634f1984edad8e0c10dc.png)
This is a mod that improves the cave experience and adds a new tool "**hammer**", which can destroy 3*3 blocks at a time.

Two new ore fragments have also been added, namely granite and chromium. They can be combined with gold and iron to form new alloys, rose gold and steel.



**New item**: Torch Bag - you can put torch inside and placed torch right click with it. 



**New Boss** : |||**The Old Miner**|||  appear in the cave,he will attack you when you're mining.

You can also use the soul fire to burn the minecart to summon him.



Connect with [Just-In OCEAN](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-in-ocean) to create the water spirit hammer.



More content about cave experiences will be added in the future.
